overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player exploring a dystopian night market in Dogtown. The clip features a dark, foggy atmosphere dominated by teal neon lighting, with the player ascending concrete stairs, passing through a gated entrance, and navigating through an open-air shantytown market before climbing final stairs toward a large industrial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway leading to gated entrance

events.description: passing through metal gate structure into open market area

agents.ego_description: climbing wide concrete stairs toward a metal gate entrance

entered.detail: wide weathered concrete stairs with horizontal treads
large industrial metal gate with vertical bars and caution signage
elevated concrete walkway bridging above the stairway
posters and graffiti on the left concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view ascending a wide concrete stairway in a dark, enclosed environment. The player approaches a large metal gate structure with industrial signage, passing through it at the end of the segment to emerge into a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air night market with neon-lit vendor stalls

events.description: emerging from dark stairwell into area illuminated by bright cyan neon lights
encountering scattered NPC pedestrians walking through the market

agents.ego_description: walking through the night market, passing neon-lit stalls and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the left side of the market street
figure standing near market stalls in the distance

entered.detail: vendor stalls with bright blue neon tube lighting along the roof edges
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
small wooden shack with warm interior lighting
large futuristic building with spires visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the gate into an open-air night market bathed in cyan neon light. The scene features vendor stalls with glowing blue lights on the right, scattered pedestrians walking about, and a large futuristic building looming in the distance. The atmosphere is foggy and dystopian, with palm trees and makeshift structures lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to large industrial building with final stair ascent

events.description: beginning ascent of final concrete stairs toward the large building

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the final set of concrete stairs leading to the industrial building entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up to the main building entrance
tall thin metal spire structures rising beside the building
railing with cyan neon lighting running along the right side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the market stalls behind and approaches a massive industrial building, beginning the ascent of a final wide concrete stairway. The neon lighting gives way to darker shadows as the player climbs toward the building entrance, with tall metal spires visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dark, enclosed industrial corridor into a vibrant neon-lit market before ascending toward a massive complex. It begins by climbing a wide concrete stairway in a dim environment, moving steadily toward a large metal gate with industrial signage. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene opens into a foggy, open-air night market bathed in cyan neon light, featuring glowing vendor stalls, scattered pedestrians, and makeshift structures. The path then leads away from the market's glow and toward a looming industrial building, where the lighting shifts back into deep shadows. Finally, the camera ascends a final set of concrete stairs, climbing toward the building entrance beneath tall metal spires silhouetted against the night sky.
